fields.text: CFMA Member Market listserv/google group

CFMA hosts a listserv/google group for Member Farmers Markets. This group is for farmers market members to be able to communicate easily with each other, to connect and share information, resources and ideas, and to ask questions. We will be updating the listserv e-mails with the Primary, Alternative and Market Manager e-mails.
Market Locations: This information goes onto our 2026 CFMA Member Market Map

Remember that if your organization operates markets in multiple locations you will need to complete a separate form for each location - this is so that all of your market locations show up on the member Market Map!

fields.name: Market Location
fields.label: GOOGLE ADDRESS: Please provide best possible street address for this Farmers Market. This response field is linked with Google maps and "should" self-populate an address when you start typing. (Be sure to include city, state and zip code.)This is what locates the market on CFMA's online farmers market map so shoppers can find you. Note: in some cases a neighboring business address can work to get people to the site if your market doesn't have an address per se.
fields.placeholder: Type this in as your address and a google maps match will appear

fields.name: CFMA Membership
fields.label: Please select "CFMA Farmers Market Members"

fields.text:
Single Farmers Market: Farmers markets that operate in one location, regardless of whether the market is held once a week or multiple times a week in this location.

Multiple Farmers Market Organizations: Organizations that operate farmers markets in more than one location.

fields.name: Single/Multiple Locations
fields.label: Do you operate markets in more than one location?

fields.text: If you have more than one market location, fill out this form for one of those market locations. You will fill out another form, with a different Primary e-mail address, for each additional market location. You will also set up a separate Market Profile for each location - this way all of your locations are on the map, and each location has a profile on the website!

fields.text:
SNAP / Market Bucks

CFMA asks markets to make a contribution for the cost of printing and shipping SNAP and Market Bucks.  If your market is able to make a contribution for the actual cost of the bucks (listed below) or even a little more to help cover costs for markets that may not be able to contribute actual cost of the bucks, we would appreciate it so much.

SNAP Bucks facilitate SNAP purchases at markets, and Market Bucks can be used by customers shopping with credit cards or as gift cards.


Please use this form to order the quantity of SNAP and Market Bucks you will need for the whole season. You will be invoiced for the contribution that you indicate. If you attend the CFMA Conference in March, make sure to pick up your SNAP/Market bucks there. If not, we will mail you your bucks at the mailing address listed on this form before the beginning of your market season.

SNAP/Market Bucks can be reused indefinitely - please treat as you would cash. If you have SNAP/Market bucks from last year, you may not need to order!

fields.name: SNAP, Yes
fields.label: Do you need SNAP Bucks?

fields.name: SNAP Requested
fields.label: SNAP Bucks: Please list the amount you need in the field below. SNAP bucks come in $1 increments in bundles of $25. Order in increments of $25; example: $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $325, $500, $1000 etc.

fields.name: Market Bucks needed
fields.label: Do you need Market Bucks?

fields.name: Market Bucks Needed
fields.label: Market Bucks: please list the amount you need in the field below. Market Bucks come in $5 increments in bundles of $100. Order in increments of $100; example, $100, $200, $500, $1000, etc.

fields.text:
Actual cost of bucks:

SNAP bucks:

$250 in SNAP bucks: $7.50 to print, $11 to ship = $18.5

$500 in SNAP bucks: $15 to print, $11 to ship = $25

$1000 in SNAP bucks: $30 to print, $19 to ship = $49

Shipping for all SNAP bucks amounts above 1000 bucks is $19

Market bucks:

$100 in market bucks (20 bucks) $4 to print, $11 to ship (we ship all the bucks you order together, so there ‘s only one shipping cost per order)

$200 market bucks (40 bucks) $8 to print, $11 to ship

$1000 in market bucks (200 bucks) $40 to print, $11 to ship

Why does the shipping seem like a lot?  We send SNAP and Market Bucks via USPS priority mail, and we have never had a package of bucks get lost. It’s essentially like sending cash through the mail so it’s worth the cost that is higher than regular mail to ensure that we don’t have any issues with bucks getting lost and potential misuse.

 If you’re planning to attend the Annual Conference, of course no need to include a shipping cost in your contribution!

fields.name: Cost recovery
fields.label: How much would you like to contribute towards your SNAP and Market Bucks this year?

options.name: Please select from one of the following options:

fields.name: Market(s)
fields.label: Please check the box below to allow registration and selected SNAP or Market Bucks contribution

fields.text: Thank you for completing your CFMA Membership application. You will receive an email acknowledging that you have submitted this application, and you will be e-mailed an invoice within three business days. Payments can be made online via the invoice with a credit card or by check. Send checks payable to CFMA, P.O. Box 12531, Denver, CO 80212 (NOTE new mailing address). Thank you for your participation and engagement with CFMA! Your support makes our work possible. Please feel free to contact us with questions, ideas or comments at cofarmersmarketassociation@gmail.com

fields.name: Agree
fields.label: I agree that all information on this form that I have submitted is correct to the best of my knowledge.

post_submit_content: Thank you. Your information has been submitted successfully. Look for an e-mail with next steps regarding your membership.
preamble_content:
Thank you for your membership!

The Colorado Farmers Market Association is a member organization supporting over 70 farmers markets around Colorado, providing technical assistance, training, mentorship and opportunities for peer-to-peer support and networking, as well as advocating for farmers markets at the state level.

CFMA is a small and growing organization. Member dues and generous contributions from individuals, statewide partners and other funders enable CFMA to provide a variety of services to our membership and to the larger agricultural community.

Farmers Market Membership

1-10 unique vendors* $50 annual dues

11-25 unique vendors* $100 annual dues

26-50 unique vendors* $150 annual dues

51+ unique vendors* $200 annual dues

(Updated pricing coming in 2026)

If you operate more than one market, you will need to complete a separate application for each market location. This will allow us to provide a unique market location on our "Find a Market" map and a market profile for each location you operate. You will only be invoiced for membership with your first market application/renewal.
post_submit_email_subject: Thank you for your membership with CFMA!
post_submit_email_content:
Thank you for your membership with the Colorado Farmers Market Association for 2026! We so appreciate your membership - it makes it possible for CFMA to do the work we do supporting farmers markets across Colorado. We're glad that you're part of this community of farmers markets around the state.

Look for an invoice via e-mail within three business days (or less!) Thank you in advance for your payment. You'll receive an e-mail with details on member resources once payment is received.
